post_call_notes: Champion Ben Torres mentioned they're at 95 seats and naturally approaching their plan limit. He proactively brought up pricing for additional seats — not in response to a sales prompt. Budget for expansion would open in Q3 (July). Chloe (CFO) is the approver — Ben said she's 'very ROI-focused' and would want to see the time savings report before signing off.
support_summary: Zero P1/P2 tickets in last 90 days. One minor integration question resolved in 2 hours. Engineering team is highly self-sufficient.
csm_notes: Ben is a genuine champion. The expansion conversation came from him — I didn't prompt it. He mentioned the sales team rollout at least twice in the call. The only thing holding this back is timing (Q3 budget) and getting Chloe the ROI data she needs. Action: prepare expansion proposal and ROI one-pager before Q3 opens.
